Interface ISQLPrivilege

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members for granting and revoking privileges to database users.

[Guid("A867A185-C5CB-11D2-AAE2-00C04FA37849")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISQLPrivilege

Properties

SQLPrivileges

The database privileges.

int SQLPrivileges { get; }

Property Value

int

Sample Snippet

Grant(string, int, bool)

Grants privileges for the database user.

void Grant(string UserName, int privileges, bool withGrant)

Parameters

UserName string
privileges int
withGrant bool

Sample Snippet

Revoke(string, int)

Revokes privileges for the database user.
